glosses.nl: om het even welk; een of andere
glosses.nb: hvilken som helst; en eller annen

sentences.target: Da liegt irgendein Schlüssel unter dem Sofa.
sentences.reading: /daː liːkt ˈɪʁɡn̩daɪ̯n ˈʃlʏsəl ˈʊntɐ deːm ˈzoːfa/

translations.de: Da liegt irgendein Schlüssel unter dem Sofa.
translations.ipa: /daː liːkt ˈɪʁɡn̩daɪ̯n ˈʃlʏsəl ˈʊntɐ deːm ˈzoːfa/
translations.en: There's some key under the sofa.
translations.es: Hay una llave debajo del sofá.
translations.fr: Il y a une clé sous le canapé.
translations.it: C'è una chiave sotto il divano.
translations.pt: Há uma chave debaixo do sofá.
translations.vi: Có một cái chìa khóa dưới gầm ghế sofa.
translations.nl: Er ligt een sleutel onder de bank.
translations.hu: A kanapé alatt van egy kulcs.
translations.hi: सोफ़े के नीचे एक चाबी पड़ी है।
translations.el: Κάτω από τον καναπέ υπάρχει ένα κλειδί.
translations.nb: Det ligger en nøkkel under sofaen.
translations.sv: Det ligger en nyckel under soffan.
translations.da: Der ligger en nøgle under sofaen.
translations.ja: ソファの下に鍵がある。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb setting the scene; occupies initial position in a V2 clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present, indicative); intransitive, expresses location.
Indefinite determiner; nominative masculine singular, modifies 'Schlüssel' indicating nonspecific choice.
Masculine noun; nominative singular, subject of 'liegt'.
Preposition; with static location it governs the dative; heads the PP 'unter dem Sofa'.
Definite article; dative singular neuter (for 'Sofa'); determiner within the PP.
Neuter noun; dative singular, object of the preposition 'unter'.

sentences.target: Ich nehme irgendein Glas aus dem Schrank.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈneːmə ˈɪʁɡn̩daɪ̯n ɡlaːs aʊ̯s deːm ʃʁaŋk/

translations.de: Ich nehme irgendein Glas aus dem Schrank.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈneːmə ˈɪʁɡn̩daɪ̯n ɡlaːs aʊ̯s deːm ʃʁaŋk/
translations.en: I'll take any glass from the cupboard.
translations.es: Voy a tomar cualquier vaso del armario.
translations.fr: Je prends n'importe quel verre dans le placard.
translations.it: Prendo un bicchiere qualsiasi dalla credenza.
translations.zh-Hans: 我随便从柜子里拿一个杯子。
translations.yue: 我喺櫃入面隨便攞個杯。
translations.ru: Я возьму из шкафа любой стакан.
translations.pt: Vou pegar qualquer copo do armário.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ lấy bất kỳ cái ly nào trong tủ.
translations.nl: Ik neem zomaar een glas uit de kast.
translations.hu: Veszek a szekrényből egy akármilyen poharat.
translations.hi: मैं अलमारी से कोई भी गिलास ले लूंगा।
translations.el: Θα πάρω οποιοδήποτε ποτήρι από το ντουλάπι.
translations.nb: Jeg tar et hvilket som helst glass fra skapet.
translations.id: Saya akan ambil gelas apa saja dari lemari.
translations.sv: Jag tar vilket glas som helst ur skåpet.
translations.cs: Vezmu si ze skříňky jakoukoli sklenici.
translations.da: Jeg tager et hvilket som helst glas fra skabet.
translations.ja: 戸棚からどれでもいいコップを取るよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person singular, subject of 'nehme'.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present, indicative); transitive.
Indefinite determiner; accusative neuter singular, modifies 'Glas'.
Neuter noun; accusative singular, direct object of 'nehme'.
Preposition; governs the dative; introduces source PP 'aus dem Schrank'.
Definite article; dative singular masculine (for 'Schrank'); determiner in the PP.
Masculine noun; dative singular, object of the preposition 'aus'.

sentences.target: Wir nehmen irgendein Taxi zum Bahnhof.

translations.de: Wir nehmen irgendein Taxi zum Bahnhof.
translations.en: We'll take any taxi to the station.
translations.es: Tomaremos cualquier taxi hasta la estación.
translations.fr: On prendra n'importe quel taxi jusqu'à la gare.
translations.it: Prendiamo un taxi qualsiasi per la stazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们随便打辆出租车去火车站。
translations.yue: 我哋隨便搭架的士去火車站。
translations.ru: Мы поедем до вокзала на любом такси.
translations.pt: Vamos pegar qualquer táxi para a estação.
translations.tr: İstasyona gitmek için herhangi bir taksiye bineceğiz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ bắt taxi nào cũng được đến ga.
translations.ar: سنأخذ أي سيارة أجرة إلى المحطة.
translations.nl: We nemen zomaar een taxi naar het station.
translations.uk: Поїдемо до вокзалу на будь-якому таксі.
translations.hi: हम स्टेशन तक कोई भी टैक्सी ले लेंगे।
translations.el: Θα πάρουμε οποιοδήποτε ταξί για τον σταθμό.
translations.nb: Vi tar hvilken som helst taxi til stasjonen.
translations.id: Kita akan naik taksi apa saja ke stasiun.
translations.sv: Vi tar vilken taxi som helst till stationen.
translations.ro: Luăm orice taxi până la gară.
translations.cs: Vezmeme si na nádraží jakékoli taxi.
translations.da: Vi tager en hvilken som helst taxi til stationen.
translations.ja: 駅までどのタクシーでも行こう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person plural, subject of 'nehmen'.
Finite main verb (1st person plural, present, indicative); transitive.
Indefinite determiner; accusative neuter singular, modifies 'Taxi'.
Neuter noun; accusative singular, direct object of 'nehmen'.
Contracted preposition ('zu' + 'dem'); governs the dative; introduces goal PP 'zum Bahnhof'.
Masculine noun; dative singular, object of the preposition 'zu' via 'zum'.

sentences.target: Nebenan spielt irgendein Kind mit Kreide.

translations.de: Nebenan spielt irgendein Kind mit Kreide.
translations.en: Next door, some kid is playing with chalk.
translations.es: En la casa de al lado, un niño está jugando con tiza.
translations.fr: À côté, un enfant joue avec de la craie.
translations.it: Accanto, un bambino sta giocando con i gessetti.
translations.zh-Hans: 隔壁有个小孩在玩粉笔。
translations.yue: 隔離有個細路喺度玩粉筆。
translations.ru: По соседству какой-то ребёнок рисует мелом.
translations.pt: Ao lado, uma criança está brincando com giz.
translations.tr: Yandaki evde bir çocuk tebeşirle oynuyor.
translations.vi: Nhà bên cạnh có một đứa trẻ đang chơi phấn.
translations.ar: في البيت المجاور يلعب طفل بالطباشير.
translations.nl: Hiernaast speelt ein kind met krijt.
translations.hu: A szomszédban egy gyerek krétával rajzol.
translations.hi: बगल वाले घर में एक बच्चा चॉक से खेल रहा है।
translations.el: Δίπλα κάποιο παιδί ζωγραφίζει με κιμωλία.
translations.nb: Hos naboen leker et barn med kritt.
translations.id: Di rumah sebelah ada seorang anak yang main kapur.
translations.sv: Hos grannen leker ett barn med kritor.
translations.ro: Alături, un copil se joacă cu creta.
translations.cs: Vedle si nějaké dítě hraje s křídou.
translations.da: Hos naboen leger et barn med kridt.
translations.ja: 隣の家で子どもがチョークで遊んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb; sentence-level adjunct indicating place.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present, indicative); intransitive.
Indefinite determiner; nominative neuter singular, modifies 'Kind'.
Neuter noun; nominative singular, subject of 'spielt'.
Preposition; governs the dative; introduces instrument PP 'mit Kreide'.
Feminine noun; dative singular (bare noun), object of the preposition 'mit'.
